name: rosiridin
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: monoamine oxidase inhibitory and adaptogen-associated CNS effects are reported in Rhodiola literature, but no established human mechanism exists.
contraindications: No compound-specific clinical drug interactions established.
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: monoamine oxidase inhibitory and adaptogen-associated CNS effects are reported in Rhodiola literature, but no established human mechanism exists.
